hypothesis: On XAUUSD M15, BB(20,2.0) extremes with RSI(7) confirmation revert to the middle band ONLY when the market is in a non-trending, above-minimum-volatility regime (low ADX + mid ATR percentile); the prior generation's failure was lack of regime gating and overly tight signal AND-logic. With corrected gating, ~300+ trades/4.5yr should fire.

regime_filter.rationale: Mean reversion on gold only works in non-trending regimes with enough volatility to reach the bands but not so much that BBs blow out. ADX cap is the critical fix vs gen-47.

entry.long: prior_bar.low < LowerBB AND prior_bar.close_back_above_LowerBB AND RSI7[1] < 15 AND regime_on AND in_session AND bars_since_last_trade >= 4
entry.short: prior_bar.high > UpperBB AND prior_bar.close_back_below_UpperBB AND RSI7[1] > 85 AND regime_on AND in_session AND bars_since_last_trade >= 4

exit.trailing: none - fixed targets to avoid trend-exit whipsaw
